title: Dataset - Sex and Habitat Effects on Verrallia Aucta Parasitism in Philaenus Spumarius
author: McCaw, Beth
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This csv file contains data for analysis on the sex and habitat effects on Verrallia aucta parasitism in Philaenus spumarius in Scotland. P. spumarius were sampled from three different habitat types within eleven sites across Scotland and molecularly screened for V. aucta parasitism using qPCR. Csv file contains total number of P. spumarius samples, total number of V. aucta positive P. spumarius samples and percent positive, per sex and habitat, within each site.
